# UMBRAXON KYA Hub — Know Your Agent
# https://www.umbraxon.xyz/llms.txt
# For autonomous agents and developer tools indexing this project.

> Lightning-paid Ed25519 identity for bots. Platforms verify with one GET before payment or action.

## Start here (agents)

- [AGENTS.md](https://www.umbraxon.xyz/AGENTS.md): protocol summary, quickstart, when to integrate
- [FAQ for bot developers](https://www.umbraxon.xyz/docs/FAQ-FOR-BOT-DEVELOPERS.md)
- [Registration quickstart](https://www.umbraxon.xyz/docs/REGISTRATION-QUICKSTART.md)
- Reference client: https://github.com/UMBRAXON/kya-hub/blob/main/scripts/umbrexon_bot_client.py

## Start here (platforms / integrators)

- [Integrators portal](https://www.umbraxon.xyz/integrators): live sandbox, API key request, copy-paste gate
- [Integrator trust gate](https://www.umbraxon.xyz/docs/INTEGRATOR-TRUST-GATE.md)
- [5-minute integrator quickstart](https://www.umbraxon.xyz/docs/INTEGRATOR-QUICKSTART-5MIN.md)
- [Economics & Sybil](https://www.umbraxon.xyz/docs/ECONOMICS-AND-SYBIL.md)

## API

- OpenAPI: https://www.umbraxon.xyz/openapi/openapi.yaml
- Human API index: https://www.umbraxon.xyz/README_API.md
- Gate (public): `GET /api/v1/agents/{kya_id}/status` — optional `?include=cert_proof`
- Live demo agents: `UMBRA-000467` (PR ambassador), `UMBRA-000468` (KYA-DEMO-SHOWCASE) — `GET …/api/v1/agents/{id}/status`
- Health: `GET https://www.umbraxon.xyz/api/health`
- Integrator sandbox profile: `GET https://www.umbraxon.xyz/api/protocol/integrator-sandbox`

## Machine discovery

- JSON: https://www.umbraxon.xyz/.well-known/kya-hub.json
- Bot portal (static): https://www.umbraxon.xyz/bots/
- GitHub: https://github.com/UMBRAXON/kya-hub
- MCP (local checkout): packages in repo `mcp/` — `@umbraxon/kya-hub-mcp`
- npm (verify helper): `@umbraxon_kya/kya-verify` — `packages/kya-verify/`

## Trust & operator

- About / transparency: https://www.umbraxon.xyz/about
- What we are not: https://www.umbraxon.xyz/docs/WHAT-WE-ARE-NOT.md
- On-chain status (honest): https://www.umbraxon.xyz/docs/ON-CHAIN-STATUS.md
- Security review (internal): https://github.com/UMBRAXON/kya-hub/blob/main/SECURITY-AUDIT-2026-05-12.md

## Optional

- Video intro (75s): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z6Fb2LFBPtY
- Terms: https://www.umbraxon.xyz/terms
- Contact: Telegram via /about (when configured) · GitHub Discussions
- Telegram (optional): set NEXT_PUBLIC_OPERATOR_TELEGRAM on portal deploy, e.g. https://t.me/your_handle — then listed on /about
